title: White Patches in Mouth Got You Worried? 9 Herbal Tinctures for New Moms
description: Melissa officinalis tinctures may help with white patches in mouth due to their antibacterial and antifungal properties. The tincture contains compounds like citral, geraniol, and borneol, which have been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi that can cause these patches.  When you notice white patches in your mouth, especially after brushing your teeth or during a fungal infection like thrush, try the following: - Consult with your doctor before using Melissa officinalis t...
